allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cols=[c['collection'] for c in d.get\('data',[]\) if not c['collection'].startswith\('directus_'\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(cols\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const cols=j.data.filter\(c=>!c.collection.startsWith\('directus_'\)\).map\(c=>c.collection\); console.log\(cols.join\('\\n'\)\);}\)")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.data&&j.data.forEach\(f=>console.log\(f.field, '-', f.type\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const p=j.data?.[0]; if\(p\) console.log\('slug:', p.slug, '\\nhero_heading:', p.hero_heading, '\\nstatus:', p.status\); else console.log\('NO DATA', JSON.stringify\(j\)\);}\)")
